title: Vault polish: lift 3 patterns from obsidian-mind survey (north star, templates, entity hubs)
current_state: Pi's vault story is mature (per-fact L2 sync S-056, audit digest S-057, ticket sync, sessions). Surveyed breferrari/obsidian-mind for incorporable patterns. Repo is architecturally opposite (vault as source-of-truth + Claude Code hook coupling) so full integration is rejected. Three patterns are genuinely worth lifting and pose no conflict with Pi's database-backed memory model.
structural_problem: S-056 already noted 'entity-page generation' as a better_future_fix. obsidian-mind's templates/ pattern would standardize new vault notes (currently structure is implicit). A short 'north star' anchor doc would give Pi a goal reference smaller than PI.md §1.
target_state: vault/notes/templates/ holds 5 Markdown templates (Session, Decision, Ticket, Entity, North-Star) used when new vault notes are auto-generated. vault/notes/north_star.md holds a short goal anchor (locally-excluded since it contains personal goals). vault/notes/memory/entities/<entity>.md auto-generated by a new sync_entity_hubs_to_vault() in tools_obsidian.py — one page per entity that has ≥2 L2 facts mentioning it, with reverse-linked summary.
files_affected: vault/notes/north_star.md (new — placeholder; ash fills personal content; recommend .git/info/exclude)
agent/session.py or wherever sync_vault is invoked (no change expected — sync_vault already orchestrates)
success_criteria: vault/notes/templates/ contains 5 templates with Pi-style frontmatter
sync_entity_hubs_to_vault() reads L2 entities (already extracted in S-056), produces one .md per entity with ≥2 mentions, frontmatter + backlinks to fact files
Hook fires inside sync_vault() pipeline; smoke test produces entity pages from sample L2 rows
risk_notes: Three additions, no replacements. Pi's existing vault sync is unchanged; this is additive. Privacy concern: north_star.md and entity hubs contain personal content; recommend .git/info/exclude for both. Templates are agnostic and can be tracked publicly.
migration_plan: 1. Create vault/notes/templates/ with 5 Pi-adapted templates (Session, Decision, Ticket, Entity, North-Star)
4. Wire into sync_vault() pipeline (after sync_l2_facts_to_vault since hub references depend on per-fact files existing)
5. Smoke test: create 3 fake L2 rows mentioning 2 entities each; assert hub files generated
7. Append solution entry (S-060 or wait until T-083 closes, decide at close-time)
